---
title: "Project: Name"
listing:
  contents: ["./**/*"]
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description]
image: "image.jpg"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "Desscription of project"
---
